items.description: A comprehensive and extensible ontology for systematically modeling fairness notions, metrics, biases, evaluation methods, and scientific provenance in machine learning. items.description: A real-time AI-powered smart assistant control system that uses computer vision and hand gesture recognition to interact with a computer without physical touch. The project leverages MediaPipe, OpenCV, Machine Learning, and Flask to recognize gestures and map them to system-level actions for an intelligent and interactive user experience.

It is designed to all-in-one automated handles everything from initial web reconnaissance to vulnerability detection. items.description: This project demonstrates the development of a simple traditional rule-based chatbot using Python and Microsoft Bot Framework. The chatbot responds to predefined user commands using conditional logic instead of Large Language Models (LLMs) or machine learning approaches.

The framework converts unstructured literature into structured JSON and knowledge graphs for scientific reasoning, machine learning, and discovery workflows.

items.name: cleands
items.description: CleanDS is a lightweight Python framework for statistical modeling and machine learning. It supports regression, classification, clustering, shrinkage, ensembles, distributions, and dimension reduction with a unified API, formula notation, and model selection tools.

items.description: This study proposes a buyer segmentation framework using clustering techniques to identify distinct categories of property buyers based on demographics, financing patterns, geographic preferences, and investment motivations. K-Means and Hierarchical Clustering were implemented and evaluated using Elbow Method and Silhouette Score.

The library takes classifier probabilities and learns optimal decision thresholds  by optimizing multiple fairness and performance metrics, enabling multi-objective  selection via methods such as TOPSIS and Zenith.

The framework converts raw EV network traffic into enriched, analyst-friendly flow features suitable for cybersecurity research, operational monitoring, and machine learning pipelines.

items.description: Keep track of the newest machine learning frameworks on GitHub

items.description: A TED-based workflow for proteomics domain search and automated statistics. Accept proteomics data input and returns domain resolution results in a Microsoft Excel XLSX file. The workflow also includes modules for statistical and machine learning clustering and differential analysis of proteomics domain data from different species.

items.description: A hybrid machine learning framework for vehicle-specific accident risk prediction, combining historical and real-time environmental data to generate intelligent alerts for safer navigation in mountainous and high-risk road conditions.

items.description: Interactive Quarto slides and ML pipelines bridging data science with business strategy and economics. Features hands-on case studies in using Python libraries. Built for students and professionals looking to turn predictive metrics into actionable corporate decision-making frameworks.

items.name: bare-metal-ml
items.description: A machine learning framework built from mathematical foundations, implementing classical ML algorithms from scratch in Python and C++ without the use of high-level ML libraries. All linear algebra operations, probability distributions, and optimization techniques are derived and implemented manually.

items.description: Experiment framework for tabular machine learning with augmentation and multi-model support.

It unifies data collection, enables real-time analytics, audience segmentation, and personalized marketing — powered by big data and machine learning.

items.name: ModelInstabilityUnderMinorityDataScarcity
items.description: A research-oriented machine learning framework for studying prediction instability under class imbalance, featuring AMBA (Adaptive Minority Boundary Augmentation) for stability-aware minority class augmentation and evaluation.

items.name: tensorflow-federated

items.description: Github repository for the leakproof-ml tool. Also, contains as use example the results of the paper: "Leakproof ML: Data Leakage Prevention with a Robust, Interpretable, and Reproducible Machine Learning Framework"

items.name: flowMagic
items.description: flowMagic is an R package for automated bivariate gating of flow cytometry (FCM) data. It uses a machine-learning model trained on both experts data and a large, high-quality FCM dataset generated by EVE Online players. The package also provides an extensive visualization toolkit and integrates seamlessly with the flowCore/flowWorkspace frameworks

items.name: felipearocha
items.description: Asset Integrity Engineer bridging RBI decision frameworks, data engineering, and applied machine learning through transparent automation.

items.name: Punjab-Stubble-Burning-
items.description: A machine learning framework that forecasts weekly stubble-burning activity across Punjab one week ahead, at 7km grid resolution. Integrates satellite, climate, and policy data. PR-AUC 0.869 on held-out 2023 test set.

items.name: Gait-Analysis
items.description: An angle calculator that is based on google's open source machine learning framework "mediapipe" that takes in a footage of a person walking and calculates different types of angles at each frame throughout the video. This is necessary for physicians to diagnose certain locomative related diseases.

items.name: MAFIS

items.description: An end-to-end data pipeline and machine learning model built in Python to predict supply chain delays, mapped to a financial risk framework and a dual-perspective Power BI executive dashboard.

items.name: ML-framework-for-SWF-retrieval
items.description: Machine learning framework for estimating global Surface Water Fraction (SWF) from passive microwave brightness temperatures (WindSat/CIMR). Covers end-to-end data preprocessing, EDA, and a full regression pipeline including model selection, feature engineering, HPO, SHAP explainability, and error analysis.

items.name: phishing-url-detection-msc
items.description: Machine learning framework for phishing URL detection using lexical and behavioral features extracted from URL metadata.
